source: Meta Business Suite object insights + instagram.com profile, browsed live by producer (Claude) in Leon's Chrome session
capture_note: Platform-separated per CLAUDE.md. Values are point-in-time (Harrison ~5d post-publish, ant-mill ~2-3d). 7d checkpoints still pending: Harrison 2026-07-24, ant-mill 2026-07-27.

posts.name: Harrison Okene rescue-diver reel
posts.surface_note: crossposted reel; all metrics below platform-separated

facebook.retention: CONDITIONED 'views over 15s' toggle read flat ~1.0 through 13s — NOT the audience curve. Unconditioned ground truth (Jul 19 capture): 100% through 3s -> 56% completion.
facebook.surge_shape: slow crawl to ~9.4k over ~44h, then 9,570->29,619->74,892 in ~2 buckets, plateau ~77.9k

posts.name: Ant mill reel ('Every ant followed perfectly. That was the problem.')
posts.caption_had_share_bait: yes — 'Send this to someone…' + 'would you break the circle?' (a ONE-OUTCOME doctrine deviation worth noting: bait produced 4 shares vs Harrison's 5 with none)

facebook.retention: CONDITIONED toggle only (~1.0 through 15s) — unconditioned audience curve NOT captured; use avg watch 12s / ~16.5s until the 7d checkpoint.
facebook.comments_content: 1 confirmation ('This actually happens'), 1 political analogy — neither from target persona

posts.name: Brine pool reel ('The ocean has lakes—and some are deadly')
posts.note: drilled in second round — full platform split in posted-experiments.json (posted-brine-pool): FB 2,014 / IG 1,608, IG-led interactions 23/32, 3 follows, 21.5% 3-sec rate

posts.name: 'For a moment, they were themselves…'
posts.note: drilled in second round — FB 325 / IG 141, both flatlined, zero advocacy (posted-terminal-lucidity)

posts.name: 'Why does this boat look completely f…'
'Imagine being completely alone and…' (two posts Jul 12)

OBSERVED: Both breakouts are ~99.5-99.8% FB Recommendations to a cold audience; IG contributed 147-183 views each; IG account has 13 followers. IG flatlined on the breakouts and Terminal Lucidity — but NOT on BRINE-POOL: IG 1,608 views over ~2.5 days of sustained delivery (first real IG distribution ever), IG-led interactions (23 of 32), and the account's only 3 follows.

CORRECTION: the 'flat ~100% retention' initially read on both breakouts was Meta's CONDITIONED 'views over 15 seconds' toggle, not the audience curve. Ground truth (Harrison, Jul 19 unconditioned capture): 100% through 3s -> 56% completion, avg watch 14s. Ant's unconditioned curve is uncaptured; avg watch 12s of ~16.5s.
Advocacy at scale: Harrison 5 shares/21 saves/0 comments on 77.7k; ant 4/15/6 on 74.7k (WITH explicit share bait). Share rate ~0.006%.
Conversion: 0 follows and 0 link clicks on BOTH breakouts (~152k combined views).
Audience: 85% men on both; dominated by 45-75+; US/UK/CA. Ant's largest male bucket is 65+ at 42.7%.
Both surges began ~27-44h AFTER posting (delayed recommendation test), ran hard for <1 day, then plateaued.
MICROGRAVITY-FLAME was never posted (absent from IG grid and Business Suite through Jul 22).

Second capture round (same day): BRINE FB 2,014 / IG 1,608 / 3 follows / 21.5% 3-sec rate; Terminal Lucidity FB 325 / IG 141, no distribution on either surface, zero advocacy; 3-second-view rates: Harrison 50.6%, ant 45.2%, BRINE 21.5%.
PROVISIONAL: Anomaly-first-with-immediate-visual-evidence now has a NON-survival breakout (ant mill), weakening 'survival subject' and strengthening 'immediate visual anomaly' as the operative variable — REP-1/2/3 still needed to separate.
Caption share-bait does not move shares (4 with bait vs 5 without, similar scale) — single A/B, not promotable.
FB recommendation audience (older US men) is not the Curio app persona; zero conversion may be audience mismatch rather than creative failure.
observations_tier.DO_NOT_PROMOTE: None of this rewrites playbook rules until 7d checkpoints land and the ledger/learning ingest runs on settled numbers.

machine_state.known_artifact: FB rows for ant/brine/TL carry completion/watch nulls that the store records as 0 — the learning run flagged and quarantined them itself; repair at the 7d checkpoint captures
